title: GTA Online
headline: GTA Online
subtitle: 3X GTA$ and RP on Drift Races
content:
Outmaneuver mere mortals as you ascend to Drift God/Goddess status while earning 3X GTA$ and RP on all Drift Races through March 4.

Slide across the finish line in a cloud of tire smoke to complete a Drift Race in the Annis Euros (Sports) and receive the Manga Classic livery within 72 hours of completion. Take part in three Drift Races to cross off the Weekly Challenge and receive the Bright Manor Racing Suit and GTA$100,000 prize purse.
